description_long: This is a four-drawer filing cabinet with a dark wood finish and a flat, black top surface. The front face features four evenly spaced rectangular drawers, each equipped with a simple, horizontal bar handle in a dark color. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain, showcasing the wood grain texture without any additional features or hardware. The cabinet stands upright and has a slightly tapered profile, being wider at the top than at the base. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for professional or urban environments. The construction appears sturdy, likely intended for storing documents or office supplies.
description: A dark wood four-drawer filing cabinet with a flat black top and simple bar handles, featuring a modern, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with dark bar handles and a flat black top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wood grain surface and the cabinet's tapered profile.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a featureless wood grain back panel and the black top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wood grain and tapered shape.
